creator: bill.brinzer@gmail.com
text:
MooseX::Traits::Pluggable - an extension to MooseX::Traits.  Adds support for
class precedence search for traits and some extra attributes.

Note: This port depends on the devel/p5-Moose-Autobox port which I've just
submitted (PR ports/137139).  Also, it appears to be an unlisted dependency of
the recently updated www/p5-Catalyst-Model-DBIC-Schema 0.25.
